ref: I tell you not to worry about your life. Don't worry about having something to eat, drink, or wear. Isn't life more than food or clothing?
text: Nti meeka akyerɛ ho, honnwennwene ho kra ho, deɛ hobedi anaa deɛ hobɛnom, anaa ho nipadua ho, ɔfa deɛ hobɛhyɛ ho. Nkwa nsom bo nkyɛne aduane, na nipadua nkyɛne ntoma anaa?
translated: Is it not the same with food and drink, or with bodily cleanliness, that one part depends on what one eats or drinks? Do not the quality of life depend on food, and the body on clothing?

ref: On that day they will be told they are either innocent or guilty because of the things they have said. A Sign from Heaven (Mark

translated: Is it not the same with food and drink, or with bodily cleanliness, that one part depends on what one eats or drinks? Do not the quality of life depend on food, and the body on clothing?

ref: But I will show you that the Son of Man has the right to forgive sins here on earth.” So Jesus said to the man, “Get up! Pick up your mat and go on home.”
text: Na sɛ hobehu sɛ Nipa Ba he wɔ tumi asaase so sɛ ɔde bɔne kyɛ nti a.” Na afei ɔka kyerɛɛ bubuani he sɛ, “Sɔre, fa wo kɛtɛ, na kɔ wo fie.”
translated: He said to her that Nipa Ba was on a powerful throne and that she was sharing her stool with her because of her misdeeds. Then he said to her, “Get up, take your cloth and go to your house.”

ref: So the Lord's promise came true, just as the prophet Jeremiah had said,
text: Na diyifoɔ Yeremia asɛm he baam sɛ:
translated: The word of the Lord came to Jeremiah saying:

ref: I tell you not to worry about your life. Don't worry about having something to eat, drink, or wear. Isn't life more than food or clothing?
text: Nti meeka akyerɛ ho, honnwennwene ho kra ho, deɛ hobedi anaa deɛ hobɛnom, anaa ho nipadua ho, ɔfa deɛ hobɛhyɛ ho. Nkwa nsom bo nkyɛne aduane, na nipadua nkyɛne ntoma anaa?
translated: Is it not the same with the things we do, our thoughts, what we eat or drink, or our bodies, that we adorn them? Do not the things of life embellish food, and the body embellish clothing?

ref: On that day they will be told they are either innocent or guilty because of the things they have said. A Sign from Heaven (Mark
text: efiri sɛ ho nsɛm so ne bɛnam bebu ho bem, na ho nsɛm nso so ne bɛnam bebu ho fɔ.” Bebisaa nsɛnkyerɛnne firii Yesu hɔ
translated: “The things on earth are like the things in heaven and vice versa.” Jesus gave many signs

translated: It is at that very moment that he knows neither father nor mother, nor even the sky and earth, nor even his own child, except his Father alone.
